category_sources: The official MediaArea page describes AVI MetaEdit as a tool for AVI metadata and validation.
source_facts.description says AVI MetaEdit embeds, validates, and exports AVI file metadata.
display_name_sources: The official MediaArea page title is AVI MetaEdit.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official MediaArea AVI MetaEdit page with documentation sections for views, metadata standards, and use.
repo_sources: The MediaArea GitHub repository is named AVIMetaEdit, has the MediaArea AVIMetaEdit homepage, and describes itself as the AVI metadata editor.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository lookup was required.
